ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: ❤️ Support my work via Patreon, GitHub Sponsors or Liberapay
ast.target: ❤️ 通过 Patreon、GitHub Sponsors 或 Liberapay 支持我的工作

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Invalid project key. It must be 2-10 letters or numbers, starting with a letter.
ast.target: 无效的项目密钥。它必须是 2-10 个字母或数字，且以字母开头。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Invalid Jira URL. It must be the base URL of your Jira instance without a path (e.g., https://example.atlassian.net).
ast.target: 无效的 Jira URL。它必须是您 Jira 实例的基 URL，不带路径（例如，https://example.atlassian.net）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure your projects here. The project key is the actual key from Jira and consists of uppercase letters or numbers without the dash and the issue number. The Jira URL must be set without a path, like https://example.atlassian.net.
ast.target: 在此处配置您的项目。项目密钥是来自 Jira 的实际密钥，由大写字母或数字组成，不包含破折号和问题编号。Jira URL 必须设置为不带路径，例如 https://example.atlassian.net。
